positive: A stylized, minimal geometric illustration of a soaring golden eagle, perched on stylized branches. The artwork uses clean, bold lines and solid color blocking in a palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and earthy terracotta. The eagle is centrally composed and depicted in a strong silhouette style against a clean, light cream background. The overall composition should have a cohesive, retro-pop aesthetic, perfect for screen printing. The style is a blend of Mid-Century Modern illustration and simplified tribal art, emphasizing symmetry and strong graphical elements. Vector art quality, high contrast, clean outlines, designed for apparel printing.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, gradient, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, noisy background
